Lara, your trusted AI-powered translation service, is now available in your browser. Translate effortlessly across 200+ languages!

Requires a Lara account. Login or signup to get started — free and paid plans available.

---

Built on the same translation technology used by professional translators worldwide, Lara delivers context-aware, native-quality translations across 200+ languages, directly inside your browser.

No copy-paste. No switching tabs. No compromises.

---

🚀 Features

✔️ Translate where you work
Translate selected text or entire pages instantly. Edit and replace translations directly inside emails, documents, and web apps.

✔️ Translate full documents
Upload .docx, .pdf, .pptx and more. Lara preserves layout and formatting while delivering a clean, ready-to-share translation.

✔️ Seamless integrations
Works natively inside the tools you already use:
- Gmail;
- Google Docs;
- Google Slides;
- and any website.
No interruptions, no switching apps — just smooth translation.

✔️ Incognito Mode for Translations
Choose how Lara learns from your translations. With Incognito Mode, your activity is not used to improve your personal translation memory or learning features. Perfect for sensitive content, one-off tasks, or when you want full control over your data.

✔️ Professional translation tools
Improve consistency and quality with features used by professional translators:
- Glossary management – enforce consistent terminology;
- Translation memory – reuse previous translations;
- Style and tone control – match your voice and writing style.

---

📌 Subscription

Lara is free to start. Upgrade to any paid plan for higher limits and advanced features. Subscriptions renew monthly and can be managed anytime from your account.

Happy translating!

Discover more:
👉 https://laratranslate.com
Connect your CRM to use template messages, manage contacts, deals, and activities.

Pipechat is a Chrome extension that adds a CRM sidebar to WhatsApp Web to connect your Pipedrive or Zoho account.

With Pipechat, you can quickly add the most important messages as notes to your deals, add your WhatsApp contacts to your CRM with one click and create new deals as you chat. You can also schedule your next WhatsApp chats and use template messages in your conversations.

Simply install the extension and open WhatsApp Web to start using the Pipechat's sidebar.
Translates live chat messages in real-time on popular streaming platforms like YouTube, Twitch, and Kick.

Ever felt left out in a live chat because of language barriers?
Chatslator helps you instantly translate chat messages while watching streams on YouTube, Twitch, and Kick, so you can engage with viewers and streamers worldwide without missing a beat!

🔹 Real-time translations – See translated messages instantly as they appear.
🔹 Supports 243 languages – Translate chats between a wide range of languages effortlessly.
🔹 Seamless experience – Works within live chat without disrupting your stream.
🔹 Customizable settings – Choose how translations appear and which languages you want to see.
🔹 Lightweight & efficient – Keeps your stream smooth without slowing you down.

Whether you're watching your favorite streamer or chatting with a global audience, Chatslator makes every message accessible. And we’re planning to add support for even more platforms soon!
Authenticator Pro is a powerful tool that generates a One-Time Password (OTP) every 30 seconds based on a provided secret.

Setting up your OTPs has never been easier!

Features:

➤ Add Secrets Easily: Quickly add secrets via image URL, image file, or scan QR codes through the webcam with the Advanced Add Button.

➤ Autofill: Automatically fill in OTPs on selected websites for a seamless login experience. When enabled, this feature updates the OTP field every 30 seconds, ensuring the most current OTP is available.

➤ Bulk Add: Import multiple OTP entries at once (CSV or JSON) using the Bulk Add button—perfect for migrating from other authenticators or setting up lots of accounts quickly (please see documentation on Github for proper CSV/JSON formatting).

➤ Chrome Sync: Access your OTPs on any Chrome device logged into the same account, ensuring continuity across devices.

➤ Clipboard Copying: Copy OTPs to the clipboard by clicking the corresponding token box, making it easy to paste where needed.

➤ Extensive Language Support: Available in over 45 languages, making Authenticator Pro accessible worldwide.

➤ Online Time Sync: Syncs the 30-second OTP timer with the internet for better accuracy.

➤ Password Protection: Secure your OTPs and secrets with encrypted password protection, ensuring they are only accessible to you.

➤ Popup Mode: Open Authenticator Pro in a separate popup window, providing quick and convenient access to OTPs.

➤ QR Code Retrieval: Retrieve your stored secrets via QR code or text string for easy reference.

➤ Themes: Choose between Light and Dark Themes to match your browser's aesthetic (more themes coming soon).

➤ Token Management: View, edit, and delete active OTP tokens directly within the extension.

Authenticator Pro offers a user-friendly interface with powerful customization options, making it the ideal tool for managing OTPs and securing account access.

This is open source software, and you can contribute or review the source code on GitHub.

The Proview Browser Plugin is engineered to seamlessly integrate with online assessment platforms, specifically tailored for Talview customers using the Proview proctoring solution. This plugin facilitates a secure and efficient remote testing environment, ensuring the integrity of the examination process.
Functionality:
- Seamless D2L Assessment Configuration: Allows educators and administrators to effortlessly set up and customize assessments within the D2L learning platform.
- Remote Proctoring Enablement: Equips proctors with the necessary tools to supervise assessments in real time, regardless of the test taker’s location.
- Real-Time Monitoring: Utilizes advanced analytics and monitoring capabilities to track and analyze test taker activity during exams, delivering alerts in the event of suspicious behavior.
- Tab Activity Assurance: Employs focus tracking technology to ensure test takers remain on the active assessment tab, preventing any attempts to access unauthorized materials.
- User-Friendly Interface: Designed with simplicity in mind, the plugin provides straightforward navigation and operation for both test creators and takers.

Ideal for a wide range of online assessments, including:
- Higher Education Exams
- Certification and Licensing Tests
- Corporate Training Evaluations
- And more…
The Proview Browser Plugin stands as a testament to our dedication to facilitating fair and secure online examinations, delivering peace of mind to educators, administrators, and test takers alike.

Enhance your browsing on X (Twitter) with this extension that automates your feed refresh. Tailor your X (Twitter) experience with customizable intervals, ensuring you're always up-to-date with the latest tweets.

Key Features:

- Set Your Own Refresh Rate: Choose how frequently your feed updates
- Simple Toggle Control: Easily switch the auto-refresh feature on or off
- Lightweight Design: Runs smoothly without slowing down your browser
- Privacy-Focused: Operates without collecting personal data

How to Use:

- Install the extension from the Chrome Web Store.
- Click on the 'X (Twitter) Auto Refresher' icon in your browser toolbar to set your preferred refresh interval and start/stop it
- Go to X (Twitter) and ensure you're at the top of your homepage.
- Enjoy an automatically updated X (Twitter) feed based on your set interval!

Let me know how I can improve this extension!

Important note:

- Be cautious when setting a very low refresh interval, as you might hit the API limit.

Changelog:

v1.2.5
- Improved refresh functionality for Lists and Notifications

v1.2.4
- Fixed tweet refresh after X “Following” menu layout change 

v1.2.3
- Various small fixes and improvements

v1.2.2
- Fixed min and sec input bug

v1.2.1
- Fixed refresh functionality for Lists
- Added more error logs

v1.2.0
- Refresh functionality now extends to Notifications and Lists - See "Target Pages" setting.
- Implemented error logs – share them with us when encountering issues for faster support.

v1.1.0
- Redesign
- Added option for refresh when on top of page only or always
- Added floating button to X / Twitter to activate / deactivate the interval
- Added option for displaying floating button
- Added Stats for total refreshes and session refreshes
The free way to source, organize, enrich and export candidate profiles!

The SeekOut Chrome Extension is an optimized way for SeekOut users to enhance, enrich, and organize candidates. The Chrome Extension complements your SeekOut subscription by bringing some of the power of SeekOut to the web. 

➤ Enhance candidate searches on Google 
Source more efficient by automatically adding candidate details, including education, background information, and top skills to the Google results page.  

➤ Enrich profile information 
See additional information for candidates instantly. 

➤ Organize candidates in SeekOut projects
Easily add candidates to projects as you browse the web. 

➤ Find contact info in one click 
Get verified email addresses and social profiles instantaneously for candidate engagement as part of a SeekOut subscription. 

➤ Receive AI-powered recommendations 
As you save candidates, SeekOut Chrome Extension automatically finds similar candidates for you to review and add to projects. 

Compare the contact information from SeekOut Chrome Extension with ContactOut, HireEZ, Lusha, Connectifier, Prophet, Entelo, or other email hunters. SeekOut has the best contact info quality. 
 
 
* Note: The SeekOut Chrome Extension  is only available to customers with active SeekOut platform subscriptions. To find out more, please visit www.seekout.com/contact-us.

---------------------------------------------------- 
By installing the extension, you agree to SeekOut's Terms of Service (https://seekout.io/tos) and Privacy Policy (https://seekout.io/privacy).

Tiện ích tra từ nhanh cho trình duyệt Chromium (Chrome, Cốc Cốc...). Công cụ học tiếng Trung.

──Chỉ cần đưa chuột qua là sẽ hiện pinyin (bính âm),  phiên âm và định nghĩa (tiếng Việt & Anh), ko cần click.
──Hỗ trợ tra cứu cả phồn thể và giản thể. 
──Phát âm trực tiếp bằng tiếng phổ thông (Đại Lục, Đài Loan) hoặc tiếng Quảng (Hồng Kông).
──Dễ dàng tra chéo trên zdic, MOEdict, hvdic vv.
──Hỗ trợ học tiếng: tạo và lưu danh sách từ vựng, xuất từ vựng sang Skritter...

*Fork of the popular Zhongwen chrome extension by Christian Schiller, adapted for Vietnamese by Lien Hoang.

●────Nguồn từ điển:
Nguồn Hán-Việt: Tổng hợp từ nhiều nguồn uy tín. Extension developer có biên tập lại để hiển thị các nghĩa của Hán tự đa âm tiết rõ ràng hơn.
──Hán Việt tự điển, Thiều Chửu, Hà Nội, 1942.
──Hán Việt Từ Điển Trích Dẫn Edition Paris © DTK 2006-2020 (được sự cho phép của chú Đặng Thế Kiệt).
──Từ điển Hán Việt, Trần Văn Chánh, NXB Trẻ, TP Hồ Chí Minh, 1999.
Nguồn Hán-Anh: CEDICT Chinese English dictionary.
Ngoài ra tiện ích cũng hộ trợ tra chéo trên nhiều từ điển trực tuyến uy tín:
──zdic.net Hán điển (https://www.zdic.net/).
──MOEdict của Bộ Giáo dục Đài Loan (https://www.moedict.tw/).
──hvdic của Thi Viện (https://hvdic.thivien.net/whv).
──Baidu (https://baike.baidu.com) -- thích hợp tra tên riêng, ngôn ngữ mạng.
Trong quá trình xây dựng khó tránh khỏi sai sót. Các bạn vui lòng gửi góp ý đến lienhoangdev@gmail.com nhé. (Ứng dụng hoàn toàn phi lợi nhuận, làm vì nhu cầu sử dụng cá nhân nên phản hồi chậm trễ, mong mọi người thông cảm!)
Chúc các bạn học tiếng Trung vui vẻ 😄😄

●────Hướng dẫn cài đặt:
1. Cài extension từ Chrome Web Store https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/gilnapfdconbpkkigjdedkcilaalfnjb/.
2. Sau khi cài, bạn sẽ thấy biểu tưởng Hanviet (HV) trên thanh công cụ. Nhấn vào để bật (Sẽ thấy nút đỏ 'ON').
3. Ứng dụng sẽ tự động chạy trên những trang mới mở. Trang đã mở sẵn thì cần load lại. (Nếu bạn không thấy ô định nghĩa hiện ra thì thử tắt trình duyệt rồi bật lại nhé.)

●────Links:
Source code: https://github.com/alienngator/zhongwen
The code for the Hanviet Chrome extension was forked almost verbatim from the popular Zhongwen extension by Christian Schiller https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail//kkmlkkjojmombglmlpbpapmhcaljjkde.
UI adapted for Vietnamese and Han Viet dictionary data compiled by Lien Hoang.
Full credits: https://github.com/alienngator/zhongwen/blob/master/CREDITS.md.

YouTube & YouTube Music volume booster with 3-band EQ, playback speed control, and up to 300% volume boost.

🎵 YouTube Volume Booster & Equalizer (YouTube + YouTube Music)
Boost volume up to 300%, control playback speed, and fine-tune audio with precision.

🚀 Overview
Looking for a YouTube volume booster with true precision? YouTube Volume Control lets you raise volume up to 300%, adjust playback speed, and shape audio with a built-in 3-band equalizer.

Set exact volume values (0–300%), fine-tune bass/mid/treble, adjust stereo balance, and keep your preferences saved across sessions.

✨ Key Features
🔢 Precise Numeric Volume Input: Set exact volume percentages (for example, 87% or 135%) instantly.
💥 Boost Up to 300%: Increase volume beyond YouTube’s default limit for low-volume content.
🎚️ 3-Band Equalizer: Adjust Bass, Mid, and Treble for a custom sound profile.
🎧 Stereo Balance Control: Shift audio to the left or right channel as needed.
📌 Presets + Custom Presets: Use built-in presets or save your own EQ settings.
🔁 Consistent Experience: Settings apply across YouTube tabs and videos.
🎵 YouTube + YouTube Music Support: Works on both platforms.
🌍 27 Languages: Localized for a global audience.

🎨 Designed for You
Sleek UI: A clean, semi-transparent design that blends naturally with YouTube.
User-Driven Updates: Typed volume values stay in the input field (no annoying resets).
Reliable Experience: Stable behavior across videos, tabs, and long browser sessions.

🛠️ Version Highlights
v1.0: Initial launch with core volume control.
v1.2: Global settings persistence + automatic theme detection.
v1.3: Fixed cross-video volume retention.
v1.5: Added 300% max boost + 25 languages.
v1.6–v1.7: A buggy update was published and then reverted quickly to fix issues (thanks for your patience ❤️).
v1.8: Added YouTube Music support; removed extra button flow so updates apply instantly when changing the input value.
v1.9: Added direct popup volume input, a full equalizer, stereo balance control, and custom preset saving.

 v2.1.0
- Improved architecture and performance.
- Better long-session stability.
- Smarter settings synchronization.
- Per-tab / global volume mode improvements.
- UI and UX refinements across the popup.

🆕 What’s New in v2.2.0

-Added some fixes.

🔒 Privacy
This extension does not sell personal data. Core settings are stored in Chrome storage.

📥 Get It Now
Upgrade your YouTube listening experience with precise volume control, equalizer tools, and seamless audio customization.

💬 Feature Requests
For feature requests or improvements, feel free to contact me.

Refresh unlimited POP3 email accounts of Gmail with a frequency of one minute for free.

END OF LIFE 2027 
https://support.google.com/mail/answer/16604719

This extension will automate the refresh of emails from the third-party server to your Gmail every minute. There is no need to do anything else.
If you are using Gmail POP3 emails to retrieve emails from other email accounts, you may have noticed that it sometimes checks for new emails very slowly.

With Gmail POP3 Auto Refresh, you can refresh an unlimited number of POP3 email accounts at a rate of one minute for free.

It will open Gmail on the right page and automatically refresh POP3 emails. Just leave this page open and open a new one to view your emails which will finally be up to date!

You can change the refresh time, the user selected and the class for selector with the options of the extension.

Feedback and comments are welcome. Feel free to contact me at contact@evanjuge.fr if you have any problems.
I will see your email very soon because I use my own extension!

A customizable dictionary extension that supports double-click lookups in 20+ languages, 1000+ dictionaries, and Anki integration.

📚 Dictionariez: Your All-in-One Language Learning Toolkit 🚀
Learn any language faster and more effectively directly from your browser. Dictionariez combines instant lookups, your favorite dictionaries, text-to-speech, translation, and powerful Anki integration to turn reading into rapid vocabulary acquisition.

✨ Features:
⚡ Instant Lookup: Double-click any word on any webpage for a quick definition pop-up. Right-click or starting the app for a deep dive into detailed explanations.
📖 Choose Your Dictionaries: Fully customize your learning by selecting and prioritizing your favorite dictionaries. Supports multiple dictionaries for in-depth, multilingual study.
🧠 Seamless Anki Integration: Transform words from your lookup history into Anki flashcards with a single click. Effortlessly move vocabulary into your long-term memory.
🗣️ Master Pronunciation: Get instant realistic pronunciation using the built-in Text-to-Speech (TTS) feature, just select any text to hear it read aloud.
🌍 On-Demand Translation: Select any text on any website for an instant translation to your target language.
🎛️ Flexible Customization: Set customizable keyboard shortcuts that match your workflow for lightning-fast access, and benefit from auto-complete suggestions while typing your search.

🌐 Community, Support & Open Source
Dictionariez is built for and by language learners. We welcome your contributions!
* Contribute on GitHub: This project is Open-Source! Help us improve Dictionariez by reviewing, reporting, or contributing code. https://github.com/pnlpal/dictionariez/
* Explore Dictionary Collections: Find and import new dictionaries curated by the community. https://pnl.dev/category/4/dictionariez-trove
* Suggest & Feedback: Request a new dictionary or suggest features directly. https://pnl.dev/category/3/feedback
* Join Our Discord: Connect with other language learners and the Dictionariez team. https://discord.gg/sazRac4kSa
The Galaxy Station web extension allows you to access decentralized applications (DApps) powered by smart contracts on Cosmos…

The Galaxy Station web extension allows you to access decentralized applications (DApps) powered by smart contracts on Cosmos blockchains. It also includes the official wallet from the desktop edition of Galaxy Station, which users can use to manage their Cosmos blockchain accounts (supports Ledger).

This plugin enables webpages to connect to Cosmos networks, allowing them to pull live state and events from the blockchain as well as create new transactions. 

Users can interact with DApps by navigating to a Galaxy-powered webpage and connecting their wallet when prompted. After authenticating, the DApp is able to read blockchain data and request transactions to be signed through the Galaxy Station extension. Whenever a transaction is generated by the DApp, the user is first given a secure prompt where they can confirm its contents with a password before it is signed and broadcasted.

One-click to bypass webpage copy restrictions, Smart copy of website tab. with auto-copy of selected text and super copy features.

Introduction

SmartCopy is a powerful Chrome extension designed to enhance your browsing experience. It can help you crack the webpage prohibition of copying, prohibiting right-clicking, prohibiting selection, prohibiting pasting with one click, intelligently copying the website tab title and URL, and providing automatic copying of selected text and super copy functions. In addition, it also includes a complete clipboard history system, allowing you to view and reuse previously copied content at any time.

1. Main functions

1.1 Tab Copy

Copy current tab: copy the currently browsed tab information with one click
Copy all tabs: Copy all tab information of the current window at once
Multiple Format Support: Supports multiple copy formats, including:
  - Title - URL
  - Title only
  - URL only
  - Markdown format
  - HTML link
  - [Title] URL
  - CSV format
  - JSON format
  - HTML Table

1.2 Automatic copy function

- Automatically copy selected text: Once enabled, just select the text on the web page to automatically copy it to the clipboard
- Minimum character limit: You can set the minimum number of characters for automatic copying to avoid accidental copying
- Copy format selection: support copying in plain text or Markdown format to meet the needs of different scenarios

1.3 Clipboard History

- History management: save all the content you copied so that you can view and reuse it at any time
- One-click repeat copy: click on the item in the history to copy it again
- Clear history: Clear all history records with one click

1.4 Super Copy Function

Super Copy can automatically break the restrictions of copying, right-clicking, selecting, pasting, etc. on web pages, allowing you to freely copy content on most restricted pages.

1.4.1 Switches and default behavior

- Global default off: After the extension is installed, the super copy function is turned off by default.
- One-click switch: You can turn on/off this function at any time by clicking the "Enable super copy function" switch.

1.4.2 Floating button control

- Floating button display control: Users can customize whether to display the floating button of the super copy on the page in the advanced settings
- Hidden by default: The floating button is set to not be displayed by default to avoid interfering with normal browsing
- Global effect: This setting is effective for all websites. Once set, it will be applied globally
- Drag to adjust: When the floating button is displayed, you can drag the button to adjust its position

1.4.3 Memory Mechanism

- Global Memory: After switching the super copy switch, the extension will automatically remember your global settings and will remain effective after refreshing the page or restarting the browser.
- Site Personalization: Supports turning on or off super copy for specific websites, which takes priority over global settings.

1.4.4 Usage scenarios

- Support copying high-quality files such as Baidu Library
- Support copying various social networking sites
- Support copying various technology websites
- Support copying high-quality content from We-media websites such as WeChat public accounts
- Supports copying various literature, novel sites, Sina Reading, NetEase Reading, etc.

1.5 Shortcut Key Support

- Alt+1: Copy the current tab
- Alt+2: Copy all tabs
- Alt+3: Toggle automatic copy function
- Alt+4: Open clipboard history

1.6 Multi-language support

- Automatic language detection: automatically switch the interface language according to the browser language
- Multi-language interface: supports simplified Chinese, traditional Chinese and English interface
- Manual switch: You can manually select your preferred interface language in the settings
- Full internationalization: all interface elements, prompts and notifications support multi-language display

2. Basic Usage

2.1 Copy Tab

1. Click the extension icon to open the pop-up window
2. Select your preferred format in the "Default copy format" drop-down menu
3. Click the "Copy Current Tab" or "Copy All Tabs" button
4. The content will be automatically copied to the clipboard and a success notification will be displayed

2.2 Using the automatic copy function

1. In the extension pop-up window, toggle the "Automatically copy selected text" switch
2. Select your preferred copy format:
    - Plain text: Copies the original text content without retaining formatting
    - Markdown: Convert the selected content to Markdown format, retaining basic formatting and links
3. When you select text on a web page, the text is automatically copied to the clipboard in the selected format
4. A notification will appear to confirm that the text has been copied

2.2.1 Enhanced automatic copy function of selected text

2.2.1.1 Function Introduction

SmartCopy now provides an enhanced automatic copy function for selected text, allowing you to copy content more intelligently and flexibly when browsing the web:

- Multiple format support: You can choose to copy content in plain text or Markdown format
- Intelligent format retention: In Markdown mode, the basic format of the original text will be retained as much as possible

2.2.1.2 Usage

1. Enable the function: Enable "Automatically copy selected text" in the extension pop-up window
2. Select the format: In Advanced Settings - Automatic Copy Settings - Select Text Copy Format - Select "Plain Text" or "Markdown" in the drop-down menu
3. Copy content: Select any text on the web page and the system will automatically copy it to the clipboard in the selected format
4. View the results: Paste into any editor to view the copied content

2.2.1.3 Markdown Format Features

When Markdown format is selected, SmartCopy will:

- Preserve the basic structure and format of the web page
- Automatically convert HTML to Markdown format
- Automatically process common web page formats, such as titles, lists, quotes, code blocks, links, images, unordered lists, ordered lists, separators, tables, etc.

2.2.1.4 Applicable scenarios

- Content creation: retain formatting and links when collecting materials from web pages to improve work efficiency
- Information organization: Organize web page content into Markdown notes to keep the structure clear
- Document writing: quickly extract content from web pages into Markdown documents to reduce formatting work

2.3 View Clipboard History

1. Click the "Clipboard History" button in the extension popup
2. On the History page, you can:
    - View all copied content
    - Click the Copy button below the item to copy the content again
    - Click the Delete button to remove a single item
    - Click the "Clear History" button to delete all history records

2.4 Using Super Copy

1. Click the "Super Copy" button in the extension popup
2. Use the switch button to enable or disable Super Copy.
3. If you want to display a floating button, you can turn on the "Display floating button on the page" option in "Super Copy Settings".
4. If you need to set it up separately for a specific website, just switch the Super Copy under that website.
5. The settings will be automatically memorized without manual saving.

2.5 Using shortcut keys

- Alt+1: Copy the current tab (using default format)
- Alt+2: Copy all tabs (using default format)
- Alt+3: Enable/disable automatic copy function
- Alt+4: Open the clipboard history page

2.6 Advanced Settings

Click the "Advanced settings" link at the bottom of the extension popup to access more settings options:

- Minimum number of characters: Set the minimum number of characters for the automatic copy function
- History limit: Set the maximum number of clipboard history records to save
- Floating button display: Controls whether to display the super copy floating button on the page

3. Recent Updates

Updated May 2025

3.1 Add multi-language support

- Added three new interface languages: English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese
- Support automatic detection of browser language and switching interface
- Support manual selection of preferred language in settings
- All interface elements, prompts and notifications support multi-language display

3.2 HTML to Markdown function optimization

- Enhance the stability and compatibility of HTML to Markdown
- Improved handling of complex HTML structures
- Fixed the issue that HTML to Markdown conversion failed on some websites
- Optimize the quality of Markdown format output

3.3 Copy prompt optimization

- Improved the display logic of successful copy notification
- Fixed the issue where variables in the prompt message were not replaced correctly when "Copy all tabs" was selected
- Optimize the internationalization of notification messages

3.4 Enhanced super copy function

- Improved Super Copy compatibility on more restricted sites
- Optimize the dragging experience of the super copy floating button
- Improved memory of site specific settings

3.5 Floating button display control function

- Added floating button display switch: Added "Super Copy Settings" section in Advanced Settings, where users can customize whether to display the floating button
- Default hidden design: The floating button is set to be hidden by default to avoid interfering with the normal browsing experience
- Global validity mechanism: This setting is valid for all websites, and it is applied globally once it is set
- Multi-language support: fully supports simplified Chinese, traditional Chinese and English interface
- Real-time effect: setting changes take effect immediately, without restarting the extension or refreshing the page

4. FAQ

Q: Why is the text not copied automatically after I select it?

A: Please confirm the following points:

- Auto-copy is enabled (check the switch status in the extension popup)
- The selected text exceeds the minimum character limit (the default is 5 characters)
- You are not selecting text in an editable area (such as an input box)

Q: How to switch to copying in Markdown format?

A: In the extension pop-up window, after enabling the "Automatically copy selected text" function, you can select "Markdown" format in the drop-down menu in Advanced Settings - Automatic Copy Settings - Selected Text Copy Format, and then the selected content will be automatically copied to the clipboard in Markdown format.

Q: What formats will be retained when copying Markdown format?

A: Markdown format copy will preserve the following formatting as much as possible:

- Basic structure of text (paragraphs, line breaks, separators)
- Links (converted to Markdown link format)
- Basic formats, such as titles, unordered lists, ordered lists, references, etc.
- Simple text styling (e.g. bold, italic)
- Code blocks (converted to Markdown code block format)
- Image (converted to Markdown image format)
- Table (converted to Markdown table format)

Q: Why doesn't the HTML to Markdown function work on some websites?

A: The HTML to Markdown function depends on the HTML structure of the webpage. In the latest version, we have greatly improved the compatibility, but you may still encounter problems on some special websites. If you find that the conversion effect is not ideal on a certain website, you can try the following methods:

1. Make sure you are using the latest version of the SmartCopy extension
2. Try to select a smaller range of text to copy
3. For complex web page structures, you may need to select and copy them in sections
4. If the problem persists, please report it to us through the feedback channel and we will continue to optimize this feature.

Q: How to completely clear the clipboard history?

A: On the Clipboard History page, click the "Clear History" button, then click "OK" in the confirmation dialog box. This will permanently delete all history.

Q: Will my history be synced to other devices?

A: No. Clipboard history is only saved on the current device and will not be synced to your other devices.

Q: How to control the display of the super copy floating button?

A: You can control the display of the floating button by following the steps below:

1. Click the extension icon to open the pop-up window
2. Click the "Advanced Settings" link at the bottom
3. In the "Super Copy Settings" section, find the "Show floating button on page" switch
4. After turning on this switch, all web pages will display the super copy floating button
5. After turning off this switch, the floating buttons of all web pages will be hidden
6. The settings will be automatically saved and take effect immediately

Note: The floating button is hidden by default to avoid interfering with your normal browsing experience.

5. Privacy Statement

SmartCopy respects your privacy:

- All data is stored only on your local device
- No data is sent to external servers
- No personal information or browsing history is collected
- Request only necessary permissions to achieve its functionality

6. Feedback and Support

Welcome to follow us on WeChat, ID: Hi-Linux

Official website: https://100000.top

If you have any questions, suggestions or feedback, please leave a message.

Thank you for using SmartCopy!
Auto Refresh Plus - Auto Reload Page
Powerful Auto Refresh and Tab Auto Refresh Tool!

Powerful Auto Refresh and Tab Auto Refresh Tool!

[Key Features]:
Refresh pages after a set number of seconds.
Auto Reload the page after a set number of random seconds.
Set different delays per page or tab.
Stop auto-refresh anytime with a mouse click or keyboard shortcut.
Simultaneously refresh multiple pages.

[Real-time view]:
Refreshing web pages.
Time intervals for page refresh.
Number of refresh cycles.
Instantly stop auto-refresh for specified web pages.
This tool enables you to effortlessly manage web page refreshing and Tab Auto Refresh, ensuring you always have the latest information. Moreover, we pledge not to store any user data—professional, secure, reliable, and user-friendly!
BrainTool is the best Bookmarks and Tabs Manager for your online life.

Tab Tamer, Bookmark Banisher, Task Tracker. Searcher, Finder, Saver. Level up your browser productivity workflow with BrainTool. Open Source, usable free, plain text notes, to-do management and more.

Your BrainTool data is private, it's your personal information space. Back it up, copy it, share it - it's just a text file that you own.

Tame your browser, focus your attention and never be afraid to close a tab again!

Organize all your bookmarks, web resources, notes and to-do's into a personal Topic hierarchy and control your browser with the BrainTool Topic Manager. Open and close browser tabs, windows and tab groups with a click, or navigate using powerful keyboard commands. Capture links, notes and tasks while in context on a web page. Allocate each of your Topics to its own window or tab group for a focused workspace.

The BrainTool application reads from a plain text file completely under your control. It's written in the popular Org-Mode format and so can fit within any larger text-based workflow.

Import from bookmarks, Org files or other extensions, sync automatically to Google Drive or a local file. BrainTool is 100% browser based, so your data never leaves your control.

BrainTool is hard to summarize. Its a way-better bookmarks manager, but it also helps you manage your browser tabs, tabgroups, windows, tasks and sessions.  It's a personal knowledge management system that allows you to organize all of your online information sources (web sites, Google docs, gmails, files, photos, Slack channels, social media groups, code repos, wiki pages, task backlogs, Jupyter notebooks, LLM chat sessions, etc etc etc), combine them with your TODO's and text-based notes and see the big picture in the tree structured side panel.

-------  RELEASE NOTES  --------
# BrainTool 1.3
Three major improvements:
- Drag and Drop from web pages into the topic tree. Drag individual links or selected text including multiple links and drop under a topic in the tree. With a single link any associated text is added as a note. When text contains multiple links all are added under the topic.
- 🗑️ TRASH special topic. Deleted items are moved under Trash rather than immediately deleted from the tree.
- 🔖 BOOKMARKS BAR special topic. This topic is kept in sync with the items in your browser bookmarks bar. Changes made in the tree are updated to the browser and vice-versa.

#BrainTool 1.2.6
Bookmarker now checks the backing store file for external changes before allowing a save.

#BrainTool 1.2.5
Added support for dragging from the url bar into the topic manager to add a tab

# BrainTool 1.2.2
Added filtering to show just TODOs or just show matching search results.

# BrainTool 1.2
Added the ability to run the Topic Manager in the browsers side panel. It kind-of feels like BT has been pulled inside the browser!

#BrainTool 1.1
Automatic local backups for recent, daily and monthly changes. Also:
- Improved scrolling and arrow key support for search and row navigation.
- Removed/defaulted settings for Sticky tabs and Tab Groups
- Removed Notes toggle, replaced with resize control.
- Improved discoverability of Supporter purchase buttons
- Added uninstall feedback survey
- bug fixes, performance improvements

# BrainTool 1.0.3
Minor release addressing some bugs and UI feedback.
- Improved handling of dragging tabs between tabgroups and windows.
- Added 'w' as a keyboard command for 'open in new Window'.
- Improved handling of screen configuration changes.

# BrainTool 1.0.2
- Added topic expansion on hover so folded topics can be dropped into (thanks @rocketman455 for the suggestion!)
- Improvements to the upgrade process to make it clearer whats happening.
- Added trial expiration and initial nagging 30 days after installation.
- GitHub #32: When TopicMgr is in a tab - don't navigate on item deletion. If the browser is maximized don't adjust its position on first opening TM.

# BrainTool 1.0!
Here is an overview of whats new.
## Manifest V3
This change is not of great interest to a BT user but is mandated by Google and required non-trivial code changes.

## Full Tab Group Support
Full synchronization between Topics and browser tabgroups. By default Topics are now shown as tabgroups in the browser. Tabs opened from BT open in a tabgroup labelled with the appropriate Topic. In the Topic Manager open links and Topics are highlighted with the tabgroups color. Changing the tabgroups color in the browser is reflected in the Topic Manager. Name changes and expand/collapse operations are also synced.

Additionally dragging a tab into a tabgroup will save that tab into the Topic in BT. Dragging a saved tab out of its tabgroup will remove it from BrainTool.

## Sticky Tabs
When 'Sticky Tabs' is enabled the relationship between a tab and an associated saved item in the Topic Manager is maintained when you click a link in the saved tab or during a server side redirection. This allows you to navigate around a saved site or app, or get redirected to a different url (for example to a log-in page) while staying in the context of the original saved BT Item.

## Topic Tree visuals
The expand/collapse buttons and the favicon displays have been restyled, and an empty topic is now visually distinct. These changes make the tree structure easier to see, in addition to improving the styling in general.

## Session saving and Bookmarker Updates
The BT Bookmarker now has the option to save a whole tabgroup. When saving a session, tab groups are saved as the corresponding BrainTool Topic. Any ungrouped tabs are put in a tabgroup named with a Window-N prefix and saved under a Topic with the same name in the Topic Manager. The Session itself is given a Session-date Topic name and saved under the Topic selected in the Bookmarker or the Scratch default Topic.

## Preferences for Dense, Hide Notes, Tooltips and Large Font

## New Introductory Screens
We've added a helpful BrainTool Buddy to give a gentle introduction to BT when it's initially installed and at launch thereafter, until turned off.

## GDrive Auth Change
Another Google mandated update is the change to use their Auth 2.0 libraries for Google Drive authorization. Unfortunately the access provided to browser-based apps (ie those without a back-end server) is considered to be temporary access and to require explicit user interaction. If you have GDrive saving turned on you'll be warned in the red warning banner when the token expires. You can click to immediately re-auth or ignore it and re-auth will happen on the next save.

## Usability Improvements
- Rows in the Topic Manager can now be dragged by selecting anywhere on the row
- The Tab key now iterates a selected Topic through three states: collapsed, open with its child nodes showing and open with its children all fully expanded.
- Search has been improved to make it easier to see the current match and other visible matches.

## Pricing and License Changes for 1.0
- There will be no limits on numbers of nodes saved in BT (other than those due to browser storage limits)
- In addition to monthly and yearly subscriptions a one-time purchase lifetime license will be offered with pricing as follows:
  - Monthly $1.33/mo, Yearly $10.66/yr, Lifetime $21
  - This (low, low) pricing reflects my goal of having BT be widely used and to encourage users to support its development. The extra change over $1/$10/$20 covers the Stripe transaction costs.
- License enforcement will be as follows:
  - 30 days all access.
  - After 30 days messages of gentle encouragement will be shown at intervals.
  - Functionally some setting preferences will be locked (Dark mode, Favicons etc) but otherwise the app will be fully functional.

# 0.9.9a
This was a minor point release because there are no changes requiring updates on the Web Stores, but it has some major functionality!

## Local File Sync
Local file sync opens up a lot of potential for saving, versioning and backing up your BrainTool data. The file location used by BrainTool can be hooked up to DropBox, a git repository or any other cloud syncing mechanism.

Local sync is mutually exclusive with GDrive syncing, you can only sync to one place. Syncing can be turned on via the Settings screen (click the new Settings icon, top right). If you are already syncing to GDrive and want to change you will first need to turn off GDrive syncing (via 'Actions', again top right). On initiation you will be asked to select a folder for BT to access. The browser will ask you to grant permission first for Read-only access to the folder and then for read-write access.

The ability to write to a local file from a web app is a newish capability and heavily secured within the browser. Every time you re-open the BT Topic Manager you will need to re-grant permissions for BT to write to the local folder. Note that the **Brave** browser developers need to enable via a browser configuration setting.

## Settings, Actions and Help panels
The previous overlay panel put access to settings behind multiple mouse clicks and was confusing for many users. We've broken out those functions into separate panels which can be accessed directly from the top level Topic Manager. Settings and Actions are top right, Help is bottom right. Other than Local file sync, the available settings and actions are unchanged.

## Tips, Messages and Warnings
A colored panel below the topic tree now shows any required informational messages on startup and subsequently provides access to a set of tips on BT usage. If a sync file is out of date the panel shows a 'Warning' message and provides a shortcut to the refresh function with a single click.

## Minor UI changes
- Some colors have been tweaked to improve contrast and readability.
- The application as a whole now does a better job of handling wide and narrow Topic Manager windows.
- The topic card editor makes better use of space and use a fixed width font to improve org-mode compatibility.

## Telemetry
While your privacy is a key aspect of the BrainTool value proposition and we do not have any access to your data, we do need to collect some information on how the application itself is being used. On startup the app now records (to Google Analytics) the number of saved topics and pages, the number of file saves/updates, the number of tab operations performed, the number of times you've launched the app, days since install and how long your last session of using it was.

# BrainTool 0.9.9
## New Look and Feel including a Dark Mode

## Re-organized Saver Tool
Another iteration on whats been called the bookmarker or popup to make it easier to understand while keeping it fast and efficient for both mouse and keyboard users. Additionally, any number of nested new topics can now be created from the Saver e.g. setting the topic to Animal:Vertebrate:Mammal:Carnivore:Canid:Dog:Hound:Beagle will create 8 levels of topic if they don't already exist.

## Compact Mode
Another highly requested feature. Shrinking the Topic Manager to less than 350 pixels wide hides the notes column for a highly compact and information dense display of your saved topics and pages.

## "Open in New Window" Tool
You can now open a page, or complete topic, in a new window. The previous mapping of topics to windows has been removed as being too complicated. You can choose to have BT manage your tabs, grouping them into tab groups, or not, thus leaving them wherever you or the browser puts them. BT will no longer confuse you by moving tabs between windows.

## "Add Top Level Topic" Tool
Available at the top of the Topic Manager. Hopefully this one is self-explanatory.

## Topic Manager window remembers its position
The Topic Manager now opens with the same size and position as it had when it was last closed.

## GDrive Refresh Button
If you have GDrive syncing turned on, the Refresh button is now available in the top toolbar whenever BT detects that there is a newer file available.

## Topic Tree imports
A correctly formatted org-mode file will now import its contents into the appropriate nesting in the tree. See https://braintool.org/topicTrees.

## Other Usability and Misc Improvements
Removed the counter for number of saves (top right) because its no longer part of the pricing model. Lots of improvements were made in areas like the card editor, the initial topic tree, the initial placement of the topic manager etc.

#  BrainTool 0.9.8
## New Bookmarker
Re-designed it from the ground up.

## Skip the Topic!
By popular demand added a 'Scratch' topic.

## Update existing note cards in the Bookmarker
Added the ability to edit the notes and title for existing saved pages.

## Topic Manager can run in a tab
Added an option for the Topic Manager to run in a browser tab rather than the current side panel.

## Performance Improvements
Based on stressing BT with six thousand plus bookmarks a small tweak now avoids a low level recalculation of layout for every table row added resulting in a significant speed up for large topic trees. Search got similar performance attention and should now be snappier.

## Search Improvements
Improvements include better key handling on Linux, being able to 'escape' key out of search, restoring previous selection on failed search and a few other bug fixes.

## Space key
The space key will now open a tab for the selected item if its not already open, and highlight it if it is open.

# Earlier releases

## Support for Edge and Brave browsers
Edge users can get BrainTool at the Edge store. Brave users can install from the Chrome store.
## File Import/Export
In addition to Chrome Bookmarks, 0.9 adds the ability to import from a TabsOutliner export and also to import a text file with org-mode markup.
## org-mode Support
BrainTool should now retain any org markup in the BrainTool.org file (or an imported file).
## Keyboard shortcuts
## Ability to tag all a windows tabs at once
## Statistics Bar
Download Twitch clips in one click! Adds a 'Download' button on all Twitch.tv clip pages.

Twitch Clip Downloader 2025 is an extension that allows you to download Twitch clips in just one click. It's super simple and easy to use!

Want to download your favorite clips to watch offline? Want to make a backup of a clip before it is deleted by the streamer or Twitch? Want to download clips so that you can edit and use them to create a YouTube video? This is exactly why Twitch Clip Downloader 2025 was made!

—

Features:

⭐ Adds a "Download" buttons to all clips on all Twitch pages

On any page on Twitch, if you see a clip listed, there will be a "Download" button added under the title of the clip. Just click on that button and you will be re-directed to Clipsey.com where it will process the clip and get you the download link.

⭐ One-click clip download re-direct

If you are watching a clip on Twitch, just click on the extension icon, and you will be re-directed to Clipsey.com where it will process the clip and get you the download link.
Send and control NZB files directly with SABnzbd or NZBGet download clients.

Send and control NZB files directly with SABnzbd or NZBGet download clients. Allows monitoring and control of your download queue (pause, resume), and allows 1-click downloading from a handful of membership NZB sites.


Privacy:
Settings - including server authentication information - are stored in browser local storage and used only to connect to servers at the user's request. No user data is stored remotely or shared by this extension. See https://github.com/tumblfeed/nzbunity/blob/main/PRIVACY.md
A Chrome extension for exporting and importing watch lists from Netflix

Back up, share, and restore your Netflix My List in one click.

Export your "My List" to a portable JSON file and import it back just as easily — perfect for backups, sharing recommendations with friends, or migrating titles between profiles.

FEATURES
• Auto-discovery — open the popup on My List and your titles are picked up automatically, even for huge lists. No scrolling required.
• Smart caching so the popup opens instantly.
• One-click Export to JSON.
• Bulk Import from JSON, with progress and automatic retry if Netflix throttles.
• Copy all titles to the clipboard as plain text.
• Clean, Netflix-native dark UI.

HOW TO USE
1. Go to netflix.com/browse/my-list
2. Click the extension icon.
3. Hit Export to JSON to download your list, or Import from JSON to restore one.

Tip: If a large list looks incomplete, click Re-scan — it fetches every title directly from Netflix.

PRIVACY
Your watch list never leaves your browser. The extension talks only to netflix.com using your existing session — no third-party servers, no analytics, no accounts.

WASheet: Bulk Message Sender & WhatsApp CRM - Your Ultimate WhatsApp Marketing & CRM Solution

Transform your WhatsApp communication with WASheet, the all-in-one Chrome extension designed to streamline your messaging, CRM, and workflow automation. Whether you're running marketing campaigns, managing customer relationships, or automating business replies, WASheet empowers you to do it all efficiently and professionally.

Lets explore the key features as mentioned below:

Message Broadcaster:
Send personalized bulk messages effortlessly using Excel, Google Sheets, or any sheet platform. Customize your messages with templates, media, and variables to create impactful campaigns for promotions, announcements, or customer engagement.

WA to G-Sheet:
Save your WhatsApp order or product data directly to Google Sheets through Google Forms template in real-time with user consent. No data is stored in external databases — everything flows seamlessly into your sheets for easy tracking and analysis.

AI Chat Assistant:
Leverage the power of ChatGPT's latest AI modules for real-time suggested replies. Analyze chat tone, mood, and seriousness with spam alerts to better understand your clients and respond effectively.

Workflow Messages:
Automate your business replies with workflow messages triggered by specific keywords. Save hours by letting WASheet handle repetitive responses while you focus on growing your business.

Contacts Import - Export + Check:
Import/export saved, unsaved, or selective group contacts in a clean, professional format. Use the WA Number Checker to verify which numbers are registered on WhatsApp in bulk, ensuring your messages reach the right audience.

Privacy Features:
Protect your privacy with options to hide profile pictures, chat names, recent chats, and messages. Keep your WhatsApp usage discreet and professional, especially in shared environments.

Quick Replies:
Save time with pre-defined quick replies that appear in your chat interface. Send responses instantly with a user-friendly template system.

Start a New Chat:
Easily initiate chats with unsaved contacts by simply entering their number and clicking Start a New Chat.

Why Choose WASheet?

Personalization: Craft tailored messages with media and variables for higher engagement.

Perfect For:

Marketing Campaigns: Send bulk promotional messages with ease.

Customer Engagement: Build stronger relationships with personalized communication.

Business Automation: Automate workflows and replies for better productivity.

Data Management: Sync and organize WhatsApp data directly into Google Sheets.

Your Privacy Matters:

WASheet is designed with your security and privacy in mind. All features, including message broadcasting, WA to G-Sheet, and contact management, operate locally or with end-to-end encryption. No data is stored on external servers — your conversations, contacts, and API keys remain secure and private. WASheet complies with Google Webstore policies and uses trusted payment processors like Stripe for secure transactions. Rest assured, your information is never shared with third parties. For more details, visit our Privacy Policy.
